privileged_info_summary: This task involves NextGen Connect (Mirth Connect), a real HL7 healthcare integration platform that handles healthcare message routing and transformation. The task requires creating a channel named 'Lab_Order_Sender' with a TCP listener on port 6661 and a TCP sender connecting to port 6699. The destination is a simulated LIS (Laboratory Information System) that rejects orders by returning HL7 NACK (Negative Acknowledgment) messages with error code 'AE' (Application Error) and the text 'Simulated Patient ID Error'. The agent must configure a response transformer to detect these negative acknowledgments and override the message status from SENT to ERROR, while extracting and logging the error text to '/home/ga/lab_rejections.log'. A sample HL7 ORM (Order Message) file is created at '/home/ga/sample_orm.hl7' for testing. All data including the NACK server, error messages, and test data are synthetically generated by setup scripts.
